title: Cleome brachypoda
taxonomy: Cleome brachypoda is classified as a species within the Cleome genus, which belongs to the family Cleomaceae. This family is a part of the Brassicales order and the Brassicales clade is part of the larger rosids group. Cleomaceae is a small family of flowering plants commonly known as spider flowers. The Cleome genus contains around 80 species, many of which are native to the Americas. Cleome brachypoda is a specific species of Cleome, but its classification may be subject to change as botanical research continues.

The plant's leaves and roots are said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits.
